name: chu-kei
description: 日本上場企業の中期経営計画を比較・理解・調査するための品質重視ポータル

scripts.quality:v43: node scripts/run_quality_pipeline_v43.mjs && node scripts/align_metric_evidence_refs_v1.mjs && node scripts/rebuild_quality_scores_v2.mjs && node scripts/normalize_bundle_contract_v1.mjs && node scripts/build_frontend_data_shards_v1.mjs && node scripts/audit_production_readiness_v1.mjs && node scripts/validate_core_document_relevance_v1.mjs
scripts.source:coverage:diagnose: npm run source:coverage:queue && npm run source:coverage:discover && npm run source:coverage:export
